html:
Exclusive to:

Turbine Blades are an Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are dropped by the Sealnado's Twister form and can only be used to craft the Iron Wind.

Usage

×2
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Turbine Blades
10
Dropped by
"turbine_blades"
“Perhaps this powered that beastly storm?”
–Wilson
“What do these do?”
–Willow
“Blade that does not cut.”
–Wolfgang
“No longer turning.”
–Wendy
“THIS WAS THE ENGINE OF THE STORM”
–WX-78
“I'll have to research what I can do with these!”
–Wickerbottom
“Makes my head spin.”
–Woodie
“It appears expertly engineered.”
–Maxwell
“Who manufactured this blade? It's quite precise!”
–Wagstaff
“What sört öf strange swörd is this?”
–Wigfrid
“Weird.”
–Webber
“Twirly!”
–Walani
“Could work in a food processor.”
–Warly
“Methinks thar's a use fer this.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A TWIRLY THING”
–Wilba
“Wooshy”
–Wormwood
“Doesn't look like the kind that would fall off an airplane.”
–Wheeler
Turbine Blades are an Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are dropped by the Sealnado's Twister form and can only be used to craft the Iron Wind.

'''Turbine Blades''' are an [[Item]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. They are dropped by the [[Sealnado]]'s Twister form and can only be used to craft the [[Iron Wind]].

== {{pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Turbine Blades
|item2 = Electrical Doodad
|item3 = Gold Nugget
|count3 = 2
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Iron Wind}}
